description_long: This kiosk is a compact, rectangular structure with a flat, striped roof and a prominent front counter area. The exterior features a combination of metallic and possibly wooden materials, with gold and black accents on the supporting columns and counter. The roof appears to be made of a lightweight, possibly fabric or metal material, draped or structured above the main kiosk body. The kiosk sits on a wide, striped platform that may serve as a base or flooring. There are no visible windows, but the open front counter suggests a service-oriented design, likely for selling goods or providing information. The overall appearance is modern with a touch of industrial styling, suitable for urban environments such as parks, plazas, or sidewalks.
description: A modern, compact kiosk with a flat striped roof, gold and black column accents, and an open front counter for service.
description_view_0: Front view shows the open counter area with gold and black columns and the striped roof above.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the narrow profile of the kiosk and the depth of the striped platform base.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the kiosk, with the striped roof and supporting columns visible but no openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the kiosk's slim structure and the continuation of the striped platform.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with striped pattern, possibly fabric or metal, no overhangs or decorative elements.
